trust.label: Trust
recommendations: Communicate breaches and incidents promptly and clearly
Create public-facing dashboards on system performance

inclusion.label: Inclusion
recommendations: Offer non-digital and assisted enrollment channels
Run targeted outreach for women and rural populations

privacy.label: Privacy
recommendations: Adopt data minimization and purpose limitation
Strengthen the data protection legal framework

security.label: Security
recommendations: Conduct independent security testing before launch
Adopt federated or distributed data architectures

governance.label: Governance
recommendations: Publish clear grievance and redress mechanisms
